name: Edison Transportation
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER lists 6 power units, 5 drivers, intrastate-only passenger carrier, active with zero crashes/inspections in last 24 months.
fit_notes: Very small Portland-area passenger/charter operator serving private schools and field trips; sub-scale (6 vehicles). Not a yellow-bus contractor — limited tuck-in fit; possible micro-acqui-hire only.

name: Coach 28 Inc
recent_news: Operates as a mini-bus/motor coach sales and maintenance shop in West Des Moines (1816 Fuller Rd); affiliated with Majestic Limousine ecosystem. No school-bus contracting evidence.
fit_notes: Not an operating school-bus contractor — it is a bus sales/maintenance shop. Not a Summit tuck-in target; exclude.

name: Panhandle Wheelchair Trnsprtn
recent_news: No website or news found; small Panama City, FL wheelchair transport business per registry data only. Multiple competing wheelchair providers in Bay County (Emerald Coast Medical Transport, Team Adaptive, Arc of Bay).
fit_notes: Appears to be a tiny NEMT/wheelchair operator, not a yellow-bus or SPED school-route contractor. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in; exclude unless evidence of school district SPED contracts emerges.

name: Svaden Disability Trnsprtn Svc
recent_news: Website (svadendisabilitytransport.com) markets wheelchair-accessible airport and disability transport in South Florida; no school district or SPED route contracts evident.
fit_notes: Adult/general disability transport and airport runs, not student transportation. Not a Summit tuck-in fit; exclude.

name: Care Wheelchair Transport LLC
recent_news: No website or news located; small Pinellas County wheelchair transport LLC per registry only. Competes with Express Wheelchair Transport, WTS, Skyline Transport in Tampa Bay NEMT market.
fit_notes: Appears to be adult NEMT/wheelchair only — not a school-bus or student SPED contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target; exclude.
